main.summary: Builds object instances through reflected constructor selection.

field.name: Sync
field.summary: Synchronization gate for builder state transitions.

field.name: Arguments
field.summary: Indexed argument set used for constructor invocation.
field.remarks: Missing indexes are treated as null during candidate evaluation.

field.name: TypeLocked
field.summary: True once type is fixed by successful SetType call.

property.name: Provider
property.summary: Public type provider used for String-based type configuration and probing.
property.remarks: Configure active context, probe assemblies, directories, in-memory assemblies, and assembly identities directly through this provider.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.summary: Create a builder with the requested resolution mode.

method.name: CreateType
method.summary: Create builder preconfigured with runtime target type.
method.param: Resolution mode for the created builder.

method.name: CreateString
method.summary: Create builder preconfigured with target type name.
method.param: Resolution mode for the created builder.

method.name: WithTypeType
method.summary: Fluent method to configure runtime target type.

method.name: WithContext
method.summary: Fluent method to configure the provider active load context.

method.name: WithTypeString
method.summary: Fluent method to configure target type name.

method.name: WithArgument
method.summary: Fluent method to configure constructor argument.

method.name: TryResolveType
method.summary: Attempt to resolve the provided type name using the builder provider, including probe source loading when required.
method.returns: True when type is resolvable; otherwise false.

method.name: SetTypeType
method.summary: Set build target directly from runtime Type.
method.returns: True when type is accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: SetContext
method.summary: Configure the provider active load context.
method.returns: True when the context is accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: SetTypeString
method.summary: Set build target from type name using the provider.
method.returns: True when type resolves and is accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: SetArgument
method.summary: Set or replace a constructor argument at index.
method.returns: True when argument is accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: Build
method.summary: Attempt to build target object by selecting the best matching constructor.
method.returns: True when object is built or already built; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Selection algorithm: determine required width from highest configured argument index + 1; discard constructors with fewer parameters; evaluate compatibility with exact or assignable matching only; choose smallest parameter count, then best exact score, then best assignable score; fail on tie ambiguity.

method.name: ResolveBuildType
method.summary: Resolve and cache target build type.

method.name: SelectConstructor
method.summary: Select best matching public instance constructor.

item.description: Compute required width from (max configured argument index + 1).
Skip constructors whose parameter count is less than required width.
Reject candidate if any provided argument is not exact or assignable compatible.
Reject candidate if any missing index maps to a non-nullable value-type parameter.
Collect exact and assignable match counts for ranking.
Prefer candidate with the smallest parameter count.
If parameter counts tie, prefer greater exact match count.
If exact counts tie, prefer greater assignable match count.
If all ranking keys tie, mark the result ambiguous and return null.
Return null when no valid candidate exists.

method.name: GetRequiredWidth
method.summary: Compute required constructor width from sparse argument map.
method.returns: Maximum index + 1, or 0 when no arguments are configured.

method.name: TryCreateInvokeArguments
method.summary: Build invocation array for candidate constructor.
method.param: Invocation values or null on failure.
Count of exact type matches for configured arguments.
Count of assignable type matches for configured arguments.
method.returns: True when candidate can be invoked; otherwise false.
